notes: All non-budget-ablation cases share one public error target and consecutive precision policy; no per-instance gap or phase schedule is supplied.
Means remain in the trusted fixture harness only and are used to construct the opaque canonical oracle and score outputs.
Each precision level executes the S2 coherent rank-copy-uncompute circuit and reconciles its canonical query ledger.
The adaptive stop decision reads exact statevector diagnostics in classical simulation; it is not a coherent variable-time controller or free observable.
MASK is diagnostic output with certificate withheld; ties, exhausted hard caps, and unaccepted levels fail closed as INCONCLUSIVE.
This panel supports implementation auditing only, not a new upper bound, matching lower bound, quantum advantage, or CCF-A claim.
